'''竏嗅-ch-zh''' ('''kakachazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuolize|vacuolize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuolize|vacuolize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗅-ch-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakachazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachazh|thikachazh]] || [[word:jikachazh|jikachazh]] || [[word:shikachazh|shikachazh]] || [[word:kikachazh|kikachazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachazh|thuthukachazh]] || [[word:jujukachazh|jujukachazh]] || [[word:shushukachazh|shushukachazh]] || [[word:kukukachazh|kukukachazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachazh|thukachazh]] || [[word:jukachazh|jukachazh]] || [[word:shukachazh|shukachazh]] || [[word:kukachazh|kukachazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachazh|thukachazh]] || [[word:jukachazh|jukachazh]] || [[word:shukachazh|shukachazh]] || [[word:kukachazh|kukachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachazh|thekachazh]] || [[word:jekachazh|jekachazh]] || [[word:shekachazh|shekachazh]] || [[word:kekachazh|kekachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachazh|thothokachazh]] || [[word:jojokachazh|jojokachazh]] || [[word:shoshokachazh|shoshokachazh]] || [[word:kokokachazh|kokokachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachazh|thokachazh]] || [[word:jokachazh|jokachazh]] || [[word:shokachazh|shokachazh]] || [[word:kokachazh|kokachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachazh|thokachazh]] || [[word:jokachazh|jokachazh]] || [[word:shokachazh|shokachazh]] || [[word:kokachazh|kokachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦkachazh|thﾃｦkachazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦkachazh|jﾃｦkachazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦkachazh|shﾃｦkachazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦkachazh|kﾃｦkachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachazh|thathakachazh]] || [[word:jajakachazh|jajakachazh]] || [[word:shashakachazh|shashakachazh]] || [[word:kakakachazh|kakakachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachazh|thakachazh]] || [[word:jakachazh|jakachazh]] || [[word:shakachazh|shakachazh]] || [[word:kakachazh|kakachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachazh|thakachazh]] || [[word:jakachazh|jakachazh]] || [[word:shakachazh|shakachazh]] || [[word:kakachazh|kakachazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakachazh|shakachazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakachazh|goshakachazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakachazh|gokishakachazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakachazhnﾃｼ|shakachazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakachazhnknﾃｼ|goshakachazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachazhnﾃｼ|gokishakachazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakachazhshﾃｫ|shakachazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkshﾃｫ|goshakachazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakachazhshﾃｫ|gokishakachazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachazhro|shakachazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkro|goshakachazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachazhro|gokishakachazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachazhmu|shakachazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkmu|goshakachazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachazhmu|gokishakachazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakachazhsher|shakachazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakachazhnksher|goshakachazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakachazhsher|gokishakachazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakachazhng|shakachazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkng|goshakachazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakachazhng|gokishakachazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakachazhya|shakachazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkya|goshakachazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakachazhya|gokishakachazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakachazhyam|shakachazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkyam|goshakachazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakachazhyam|gokishakachazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shakachazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshakachazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishakachazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachazhnﾃｼro|shakachazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachazhnknﾃｼro|goshakachazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachazhnﾃｼro|gokishakachazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachazhnﾃｼmu|shakachazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachazhnknﾃｼmu|goshakachazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachazhnﾃｼmu|gokishakachazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shakachazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshakachazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishakachazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachazhshﾃｫro|shakachazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkshﾃｫro|goshakachazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachazhshﾃｫro|gokishakachazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachazhshﾃｫmu|shakachazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshakachazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachazhshﾃｫmu|gokishakachazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachazhronﾃｼ|shakachazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkronﾃｼ|goshakachazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachazhronﾃｼ|gokishakachazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachazhroshﾃｫ|shakachazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshakachazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachazhroshﾃｫ|gokishakachazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachazhromu|shakachazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkromu|goshakachazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachazhromu|gokishakachazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachazhmunﾃｼ|shakachazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshakachazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachazhmunﾃｼ|gokishakachazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachazhmushﾃｫ|shakachazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshakachazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachazhmushﾃｫ|gokishakachazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachazhmuro|shakachazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachazhnkmuro|goshakachazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachazhmuro|gokishakachazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
